CustomField.formula: IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=4, "Canaccede Acquisitions", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=5, "Aeox Acquisitions", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=6, "Affirm Acquisitions LP", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=7, "Canaccede L. P.", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=8, "Canaccede Int'l Holdings", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=9, "Fidem Finance Inc", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=10, "Fidem Finance Inc", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=11, "Canaccede Assets Ltd", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=13, "Canaccede Credit LP", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=14, "Canaccede Financial Group", IF(VALUE( Legal_Entity__c )=15, "CFG Canada Funding, LLC", "") ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )))
CustomField.label: Legal Entity Name
